commandSummary.init: bootstrap or repair .labflow workspace state files in the current directory
commandSummary.task: add, list, show, complete, reopen, and remove lightweight workspace tasks
commandSummary.session: start, inspect, replace, and close the active workspace session
commandSummary.memory: append tagged notes and inspect workspace memory state
commandSummary.status: report workspace state, schema health, and proof visibility with optional json
commandSummary.doctor: print canonical identity, environment basics, and detect known legacy binaries
